content.en:
Airplanes!!!

Ye Tian first disintegrated his other copy body, and then began to copy the body of the Xuantu master.

After a long time, after spending a lot of resources, Ye Tian finally copied the body of the Xuantu controller.

However, as soon as the replication is successful, the body will collapse.

The first time.

Ye Tian used the secret technique of life to keep his body under control from collapsing.

The secret of life is very powerful, after all, it was created by the Ten Elements Ancestor, and even it is of great use to Ye Tian now.

The endless power formed by the secret of life constantly repairs the collapsed body of control, although it still can't be repaired, but at least for a certain period of time, it can maintain the body of control and will not completely collapse.

Now that the body of the Xuantu controller is in place, Ye Tian began to study it slowly.

Time passed slowly, and it didn't take long for this replica body to collapse in a study, and it couldn't even protect the secret of life, which directly led to the complete collapse of the body of control.

As a result, the replica body fell.

"Let's make another copy!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently, he continued to copy the body of the master of the Xuantu, striving to solve the collapse of the body of the master of the Xuantu in the attempt again and again.

The years passed.

Year after year passed, Ye Tian failed again and again, and spent a lot of resources, after all, every time he condensed the body of an eight-realm level controller, the price of resources paid was not low.

Fortunately, it's just some resources that he doesn't need, and he doesn't feel too distressed.

Before you know it, millions of years have passed.

At this time.

Ye Tian finally had some results!

"The master of the Xuantu should have been invaded by some special force, which caused the root of the body of control to collapse directly, and this power is mysterious and mysterious, and it is completely integrated with the root, if it is not stripped out, no matter what the master of the Xuantu is, there is no way to change the collapse of the body of control. "

Ye Tian muttered.

And now, Ye Tian's method is to create a secret technique and draw out that kind of power, which is the root of solving the problem.

this day.

After trying again and again, Ye Tian finally traced back to the depths of the root of the Xuantu master's body.

Here, he sensed a terrifying black aura, just a few wisps, but it made Ye Tian's will collapse.

"It's these few traces of black aura that make the controlling body of the Xuantu controller collapse, what kind of power is this?" Ye Tian was curious.

However, he didn't dare to study this kind of power too much, because it was obviously not the power that Ye Tian was qualified to contact now, maybe the level of Shizun knew its origin.

Now, Ye Tian's purpose is to attract these few traces of black aura out of his control.

Next, he tried to create such a secret technique to touch this black aura, but failed again and again.

After a long time, Ye Tian realized that it was too difficult to directly attract this power, it had to be transferred through a medium, and the other party's life level must be high, otherwise it would not be attracted.

In the end, Ye Tian decided to test the Black Silent Sea.

In the Boundary River or the Origin Boundary Sea, there are still many life forms like the Black Silent Sea, and the life level is very high, enough to be used as a test subject.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian came to the edge of a dark sea and began to experiment.

Of course, he shielded himself from being perceived by the real master of the Xuantu.

However, the other party is now too busy to take care of himself, and he will not know about his copying of the body of the master of the Xuan Tu.

Another period of time passed, and Ye Tian finally made a breakthrough, so on this day, he created a secret technique.

In the midst of the dark sea.

Ye Tian used the body of the Xuantu controller to perform this secret technique, and suddenly three black auras appeared on his body, and these three black auras were absorbed by the Black Silent Sea.

The next moment.

The huge Black Silence Sea absorbed three black auras and began to collapse.

Click!!!!

Patches of areas collapsed and died.

Soon after, a dark sea died.

The Black Silent Sea, which made many eternal masters helpless and immortal, was killed by the three breaths.

"It's done, but this secret technique still has a big flaw, it will hurt the foundation of the body of control, but this is a life-saving for the master of the Xuantu, there are flaws, he doesn't care!

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Because if he wants to perfect it, it will take a long time, and the master of the Xuantu may not be able to hold out until that time.

Therefore, he still chose to directly trade this imperfect secret art to the master of the Xuantu.

"Give this secret art a name!"

Ye Tian thought for a while, and named it Black Induction!

Anyway, it's just a random name, so you don't need to take it too seriously.

Next, it's time to trade with the Master of the Mystery Map.

He had paid so much to create this secret art, just three statues of ten thousand phases was definitely not enough, and he was ready to make the master of the Xuantu pay some more price.

.......

Xuantian Sect.

This is the force where the Xuantu controller is located, and he is the founder of the Xuantian Sect, the first sect master, and now the Supreme Elder.

Airplanes!!!!

Ye Tian descended on the Xuantian Sect, and the aura of the Eight Realm-level controllers immediately made the countless cultivators of the Xuantian Sect tremble.

"Meet the Infinite Master!"

A Six Realms-level controller said respectfully.

This is the current sect master of Xuantian Sect, Xuanxu Controller.

"I want to see the master of the Xuantu!" Ye Tian said.

He knew that the Xuantu controller was in the Xuantian Sect, but all the Eight Realm-level controllers like him had come out, but the Xuantu controllers had not appeared, which was obviously a very bad situation.

"Endless Master, my Elder Taishang is in a very bad situation right now, relying on the magic circle to maintain his physical body from collapsing, and there is no way to come out to see you, I'm sorry!" said the Xuanxuan Master.

"I've found a solution to the master of the Xuantu. "

Ye Tian said.

However, the Xuanxu Controller had no expression, and said lightly: "Endless Controller, my family's Supreme Elder's current body can't withstand the toss!"

"Could it be that someone tried it, but they all failed, and it made the control of the Xuantu controller even worse?" Ye Tian frowned.

"Yes!"

The Void Controller nodded.

"Take me with you, whether the master of the Xuantu himself wants to try it or not, that's his problem, besides, does he really have to wait for death completely? Ye Tian said.

"I'll report back!"

Xuanxuan Controller Dao.
